theScene: HideHealth
For all of known history, humans have been preyed upon by monster girls.
Women were turned into monsters, men were enslaved as breeding stock, and children born of these unholy unions would never be human.
It was an age of terror, and the monsters, led by the legendary 'Demon Queen', nearly brought humanity to the brink of extinction.
When all hope seemed lost, a chosen hero, wielding the power of the Goddess Venereae, arose and defeated the Demon Queen.
After rallying humanity underneath the banner of the Goddess, the hero forced the monster girl invaders back to their home continent of Lucidia.
Peace and prosperity reigned across Fertilia, the lands of the humans.
But this peace would not last long, however, as rumors began to spread that a new Demon Queen had risen in the lands of Lucidia, determined to get revenge for the defeat of her predecessor...
And thus, an age of endless warfare began. Heroes rose and fell, and Demon Queens came and went. The world itself trembled in the wake of the brutal conflicts.
But this bloody age has long since passed, and we now live in an age of adventure!
The monster girls have been confined to their home continent of Lucidia, a wretched, dreamlike place suffused in dark magic and darker intent.
This dark continent is where we send young adventurers, for treasure and fame await those who succeed. Those that fail, however, are never heard from again...
One must never forget the true goal of an adventurer, however: to defeat the Demon Queen!
If you manage to succeed in this goal, you will ensure that humanity stays safe, at least until the next Demon Queen arises.
This is the speech given to all who enter the adventuring school known as Adventum, where you recently graduated, top of your class.
The speech fails to mention, however, that many male adventurers DO return, often with a 'trophy wife' in tow.

Many disapprove of such relations, but it has been proven that monster girls can be 'domesticated', although this mostly applies to the most common types of monster girls like cow girls and cat girls.
A recent development in modern magic has even started to allow monster girls to bear human children.

But the current Demon Queen sees this development as a threat to the status quo and has begun acting on her displeasure, spurring adventurers and heroes everywhere to travel to Lucidia to stop her no doubt nefarious plans.
So now you travel by boat from Fertilia to Lucidia, eager to begin your adventure. It's a long trip, so you sleep well...
